developer.name: City of South Fulton IT Department

shortDescription.default: City of South Fulton Employee Intranet — v3.1: Application Customizer header/footer + 4 individual web parts

longDescription.default: Complete COSF intranet package: branded Application Customizer header (every page), Hero Banner, Departments Grid, Announcements Feed, and Quick Links web parts. All COSF brand colors, all data read from SharePoint lists with demo fallbacks.

features.title: COSF Intranet Header & Footer Extension
features.description: Application Customizer that injects the COSF branded header and footer on every page site-wide.

features.title: COSF Hero Banner Web Part
features.description: Full-width hero banner with fully editable headline, tagline, background image, and CTA button.

features.title: COSF Departments Grid Web Part
features.description: Searchable 3-column card grid of all 18 city departments. Reads from Department Directory list.

features.title: COSF Announcements Web Part
features.description: Expandable announcements feed reading from the City Announcements list.

features.title: COSF Quick Links Web Part
features.description: Icon-based quick link grid reading from the Intranet Quick Links list.

features.title: COSF Intranet Portal Web Part
features.description: Full City of South Fulton intranet — branded header, nav tabs, departments, announcements, and all section pages in a single React web part.
